text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and interact with human language. One key use is text understanding, where systems can extract meaning from written documents, such as identifying main ideas in articles. Another important application is translation, allowing tools like Google Translate to convert text between languages. Sentiment analysis is also common; for example, companies analyse customer reviews to detect positive or negative feelings. Finally, chatbots use NLP to have conversations with people, answering questions or providing support on websites. Overall, NLP makes it possible for machines to work with language in many useful ways.
